claim: GPT-5.4 generates 1.2M lines of code for 4444 Java assignments; Claude Sonnet 4.6 generates 627k but with highest security issue rate (300 per million lines).
actionable: Do not assume higher pass rates correlate with code quality; audit security and verbosity metrics before deployment.
source_title: Can LLMs generate Enterprise Quality Code?

claim: Sonar leaderboard evaluates 53+ models on pass rate, code bloat, cyclomatic complexity, cognitive complexity, bug density, security issues; newer models generate more verbose code.
actionable: Use Sonar leaderboard to select models based on enterprise quality metrics, not just functional correctness.
source_title: Can LLMs generate Enterprise Quality Code?

claim: Training data contains mixed-quality code, inbuilt security flaws, and subtle logic errors that models amplify in output.
actionable: Apply Sonar Sweep to sanitize training data before fine-tuning agents; catch issues upstream.
source_title: Can LLMs generate Enterprise Quality Code?

claim: ACDC framework: Guide (context augmentation), Verify (SonarQube agentic analysis in 1-5 sec before commit), Solve (remediation agent).
actionable: Implement ACDC in coding agent pipeline; run Sonar analysis during development, not just CI.
source_title: Can LLMs generate Enterprise Quality Code?

claim: Sonar context augmentation pushes entire codebase into LLM context; Sonar Sweep treats problematic training data.
actionable: Use context augmentation to ground agent in full codebase; ensure model sees architectural context before coding.
source_title: Can LLMs generate Enterprise Quality Code?

claim: Remediation agent creates one fix per issue, runs through analysis+compilation, discards if regression detected before presenting PR.
actionable: Build feedback loops into coding agents; verify fixes don't introduce regressions before surfacing to developers.
source_title: Can LLMs generate Enterprise Quality Code?

claim: Gemini/GPT models produce unrequested test files and don't clean them up; violates code quality standards.
actionable: Add post-generation linting to remove artifacts and enforce style before human review.
source_title: Can LLMs generate Enterprise Quality Code?

claim: Cognitive complexity (Sonar proprietary metric) measures readability and maintainability better than cyclomatic complexity.
actionable: Use cognitive complexity to evaluate code quality beyond branch count; prioritize maintainability in agent outputs.
source_title: Can LLMs generate Enterprise Quality Code?
